title: Ye Mo
content:
Ye Mo
 is a former royal of the 
Ancient Clan
's Dao Clan Branch, albeit with the lowest purity of bloodline from the Imperial Family. He is the progenitor of all 
Ancient Clan
 members in the Cave World.

While he was alive, he possessed a full 27 Stars, mastering the arts of the Shi and Ji Branches of the clan as well.

Contents

1

Background

2

History

2.1

Book Eleven

3

Links and References

Background
[
]

He is a member of the 
Ancient Clan
 who participated during the 
Heavenly Madness
 events that took place in Wang Lin's Cave World, he died during the war but before that he had scattered 3000 drops of blood, his body was scattered all over the Cave World. He's a descendant from the Ancient Dao Country's Imperial Family but his bloodline is only slightly superior than the common Ancient Clan bloodline.

Wang Lin was able to find his legacy at the Ancient Graveyard located at the Ancient Star Territory of the 
Outer Realm
.
Warning Spoiler

He was the only member of his imperial branch to become an Ancient Order member, possessing 27 Stars. After his fall, they continued to have a minimal presence in the Dao Clan until Luo Chen became the next Ancient Dao Emperor due to Wang Lin and Xuan Luo influence.

History
[
]

Book Eleven
[
]

After 
Wang Lin
 gained all eight drops of Ye Mo's Origin Soul Blood, Ye Mo attempted to possess Wang Lin's body and revive. Normally, this would've been simple since the person he would be possessing would be his successor. However, Wang Lin was different. He had obtained the recognition of the 
Ancient Ancestor
 and the Ancient Ancestor’s soul blood. As a result, he was an existence even more noble than Ye Mo, so Ye Mo couldn’t succeed.

Later, his heart tried to resist being absorbed by Wang Lin, but Wang Lin finally convinced Ye Mo to yield by promising to find his left eye.
